video_prompt: style: Cinematic Realism v1, mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, color palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. cinematic live-action video shot. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. prop (mug_red_v1): state: on table, waiting, visually consistent. Rain stops, city appears washed clean., The red mug remains on the table, as if waiting for the next person who needs truth. Narration: "雨停了。城市像刚被洗过，而红杯留在桌上，等下一个需要真相的人。". Protagonist A says: "故事，从这里结束。". Camera motion: medium shot, subtle hand-held camera feel, focus on subject action. Medium shot, kitchen table after rain, red mug prominently on table, soft post-rain light, clean city visible through window, hopeful atmosphere, cinematic, 35mm lens. Character identity locked to reference images. No face morphing or outfit variation.. Scene layout locked to context reference frame. Do not reposition props or alter lighting source.. All props match reference images exactly. Prop must_keep: shape, color, size, material unchanged.. Camera transition smooth from previous shot continuity frame. No abrupt jump cut between shots. Stable visual consistency across entire clip. No character drift, no prop mutation, no scene layout shift.
video_prompt_keywords: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting, red fridge, wooden table, rainy window, dim warm lamp + blue moonlight, mug_red_v1, Rain stops, city appears washed clean., The red mug remains on the table, as if waiting for the next person who needs truth., Protagonist A says: "故事，从这里结束。", Medium shot, kitchen table after rain, red mug prominently on table, soft post-rain light, clean city visible through window, hopeful atmosphere, 35mm lens

negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, dark, gloomy, cluttered, multiple characters, duplicate person, clone, inconsistent lighting, wrong angle, lens distortion, chromatic aberration, mouth mismatch, silent face, frozen expression, unnatural dubbing, face morphing, character drift, outfit change, prop mutation, scene layout shift, extra fingers, distorted limbs, text artifacts, burnt-in subtitles, logo, watermark, motion blur excessive, flickering, framing jump cut
camera_motion: medium shot, subtle hand-held camera feel, focus on subject action

action_beats: Rain stops, city appears washed clean.
The red mug remains on the table, as if waiting for the next person who needs truth.

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: 雨停了。城市像刚被洗过，而红杯留在桌上，等下一个需要真相的人。

reference_images.note: wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right
table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp
rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge

workflow.tool_instructions: No keyframes found yet. Generate keyframe images first using build-image-prompts, save them to S050/keyframes, then re-run this compiler for img2vid conditioning. Text-to-video is still possible with just 'video_prompt'.
